name: notification
description: Alert the user through one or more channels. Provider handles channel selection, formatting, titles, and repeat logic. Message carries context — Claude-powered providers can parse and format intelligently.

tools.name: send_notification
tools.description: Send a notification to the user

hints.description: Optional sideband dict. Providers read keys they care about, ignore the rest. Known keys documented in hints registry below.

urgency.description: Urgency level — provider maps to appropriate channels and priority

url.description: Related URL for context (e.g., product link, dashboard)

source.description: Name of the plugin or system that generated the notification
